center.name: 尼科巴群岛
center.summary: 尼科巴群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Nicobar megapode、Nicobar bulbul、和平鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Nicobar Islands, where it only occurs in the central group, namely Bompoka, Camorta, Katchall, Nancowry, Teressa, Tillanchong and Trinkat; a supposed 19th century record from Pilo Milo in the southern group is nowadays generally dismissed. Its natural habitats are subtropical and tropical moist lowland primary and secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nicobariensis (Blyth, 1846) | range_map = NicobarMegapodeMap.png | range_map_caption = Distribution of Nicobar megapode, grey area shows the distribution range of other megapodes }} The Nicobar megapode or Nicobar scrubfowl (Megapodius nicobariensis) is a megapode found in some of the Nicobar Islands (India)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Asian fairy bluebird is found in Sri Lanka and the western coast of India from Travancore up to the latitude of Shivamogga, Belgaum and Sawantwadi; Sikkim and the lower ranges of the Himalayas to Dibrugarh in Assam; the Khasi Hills; Cachar; Manipur; Bangladesh; Arrakan; Bago and Taninthayi Division in Burma; the Andaman and Nicobar Islands
